visual_description: A wide, low-angle shot captures a dark, wet city street at night. The audio is dominated by the loud, piercing wail of a police siren, creating a sense of urgency and emergency. In the background, a large, modern building with the illuminated sign "MANDARIN ORIENTAL" is visible among other skyscrapers. A few figures are scattered on the wet pavement, and a dark car is parked in the middle of the road. The camera pans slightly, following the movement of a police van with its headlights on, as it drives down the street. The sound is sharp and continuous, echoing slightly as if in an urban environment. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The camera angle shifts to a closer, ground-level view, still looking up at the entrance of a building at night. The building has large columns and a sign with Chinese characters above the doorway. The police van, now more prominent, approaches with its bright headlights creating a lens flare. Silhouettes of people, including what appear to be police officers, are seen walking near the building's entrance. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
